## Summary

Adds `/mock/pricing-premium` — standalone design preview for the public `/pricing` route.

**Scope:** isolated `app/mock/*` route only. Zero live routes, auth, pipeline, or runtime changes.

## What
- Light surface, teal-accented three-tier pricing (Essentials free / Professional $29 / Studio $79)
- Teal ring + filled CTA on recommended tier only
- Design rationale section inline
- Consistent with existing `/mock/*` design language

## Checklist
- [x] Mock only — not connected to Stripe or live auth
- [x] Consistent with existing `/mock/*` design system
- [x] Gallery entry already wired in `app/mock/page.tsx`
